subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Be Thou a friend and helper unto this essence of the righteous ones. Grant him triumph and bestow upon him nobility [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار اين جوهر ابرار را يار و ياور باش کامکار کن بزرگوار نما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
